description: Return a list of schedule imports for this project, most recent first.

message.description: In the event that the schedule import failed, this field will contain a description of the failure. Note that if the import was successful, or if the import has not yet been processed, this field w...

processed_at.description: The time at which the schedule import processing completed.

success.description: If this field is `true`, this indicates that the schedule import was successful. `false` indicates that the schedule import failed. The `message` field should indicate why the import failed. `null`...

uploaded_at.description: The time at which the schedule was uploaded.

name.description: Base name of the file without its path

content_type.description: A mime type or a file extension

url.description: URL to download the attached file. HTTP client should be prepared to follow redirects to successfully download the file.
